Who We Are

Your Omaha Roofing Solution

Roofer Mike's Roofing & Roof Repair Omaha was founded on a simple principle: provide honest, dependable roofing services to our neighbors. We've seen firsthand the damage Nebraska weather can inflict, and we're committed to ensuring every roof we work on is built to last.

We approach every project with meticulous attention to detail and a dedication to using the highest quality materials. Our team takes pride in clear communication, transparent pricing, and exceeding expectations, no matter the size or scope of the job.

As a local Omaha business, we believe in giving back to the community that supports us. We actively participate in local initiatives and strive to be a positive influence in the neighborhoods we serve.

12+ Years
800+ Projects
97% Satisfaction
GET IN TOUCH →

Our Difference

Why Choose Roofer Mike's Roofing & Roof Repair Omaha

Experienced Professionals

Our team has years of experience handling all types of roofing challenges specific to the Omaha climate.

Quality Materials

We only use premium roofing materials from trusted manufacturers to ensure long-lasting protection.

Transparent Pricing

We provide detailed, upfront estimates with no hidden fees or surprises.

Customer Satisfaction

We're committed to your complete satisfaction and stand behind our workmanship.

Protect your home with Omaha's most reliable roofing services. Contact us now.

Client Feedback

What Our Clients Say

“

Mike and his team were fantastic! We had a leak in our roof after a big storm, and they came out quickly to assess the damage and provide a reasonable quote. The repair was done efficiently and professionally. Highly recommend!

Sarah M. Roof Repair
“

Roofer Mike's team did a great job cleaning out our gutters. They were completely clogged with leaves and debris. They were prompt, courteous, and the price was fair. Would use them again.

John B. Gutter Cleaning
“

We needed a full roof replacement, and Roofer Mike's Roofing & Roof Repair Omaha made the process so easy. They helped us choose the right shingles for our home and budget, and the installation was flawless. The team was professional and cleaned up everything afterwards. Our new roof looks amazing!

Emily K. Roof Replacement
“

After a hailstorm, our roof was a mess. Roofer Mike's team came out quickly, assessed the damage, and worked directly with our insurance company. They made the whole process stress-free and restored our roof to its original condition. Excellent service!

David L. Storm Damage Repair
“

We had Roofer Mike's perform a roof inspection before buying a new house in Dundee. They provided a thorough report that helped us negotiate a better price. Very helpful and informative!

Jessica P. Roof Inspection
“

Roofer Mike's team did an excellent job repairing our commercial roof. They were professional, efficient, and minimized disruption to our business operations. Highly recommended for commercial roofing needs!

Robert S. Commercial Roofing

Our Portfolio

Our Recent Work

Common Questions

Frequently Asked Questions

How quickly can you respond to a roof repair request?
We understand the urgency of roof repairs, especially after storm damage. We strive to respond to repair requests within 24 hours and offer emergency services for critical situations.
What types of roof repairs do you handle?
We handle all types of roof repairs, including shingle replacement, leak detection and repair, flashing repair, and storm damage restoration. We have experience working with various roofing materials.
How much will my roof repair cost?
The cost of roof repair varies depending on the extent of the damage and the materials required. We provide free, no-obligation estimates after a thorough inspection of your roof.
